metrics.QueryText:
DEFINE
	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			ROLLUPADDISSUBTOTAL('product'[Brand], "IsGrandTotalRowTotal"),
			"SumLine_Number", CALCULATE(SUM('orderrows'[Line Number]))
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(502, __DS0Core, [IsGrandTotalRowTotal], 0, 'product'[Brand], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	[IsGrandTotalRowTotal] DESC, 'product'[Brand]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			ROLLUPADDISSUBTOTAL(ROLLUPGROUP('product'[Brand], 'product'[Color]), "IsGrandTotalRowTotal"),
			"SumLine_Number", CALCULATE(SUM('orderrows'[Line Number]))
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(502, __DS0Core, [IsGrandTotalRowTotal], 0, 'product'[Brand], 1, 'product'[Color], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	[IsGrandTotalRowTotal] DESC, 'product'[Brand], 'product'[Color]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0Core = 
		DISTINCT('product'[Unit Cost])

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(501, __DS0Core, 'product'[Unit Cost], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	'product'[Unit Cost]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			ROLLUPADDISSUBTOTAL('product'[Unit Cost], "IsGrandTotalRowTotal"),
			"SumQuantity", CALCULATE(SUM('orderrows'[Quantity]))
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(502, __DS0Core, [IsGrandTotalRowTotal], 0, 'product'[Unit Cost], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	[IsGrandTotalRowTotal] DESC, 'product'[Unit Cost]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			ROLLUPADDISSUBTOTAL('product'[Unit Cost], "IsGrandTotalRowTotal"),
			"SumQuantity", CALCULATE(SUM('orderrows'[Quantity])),
			"SumUnit_Price", CALCULATE(SUM('orderrows'[Unit Price]))
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(502, __DS0Core, [IsGrandTotalRowTotal], 0, 'product'[Unit Cost], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	[IsGrandTotalRowTotal] DESC, 'product'[Unit Cost]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0Core = 
		DISTINCT('product'[Color])

	VAR __DS0BodyLimited = 
		TOPN(1002, __DS0Core, 'product'[Color], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0BodyLimited

ORDER BY
	'product'[Color]

metrics.visualTitle: Sum of Unit Cost by Color

metrics.QueryText:
DEFINE
	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS('product'[Color], "SumUnit_Cost", CALCULATE(SUM('orderrows'[Unit Cost])))

	VAR __DS0BodyLimited = 
		TOPN(1002, __DS0Core, [SumUnit_Cost], 0, 'product'[Color], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0BodyLimited

ORDER BY
	[SumUnit_Cost] DESC, 'product'[Color]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0Core = 
		DISTINCT('product'[Manufacturer])

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(1001, __DS0Core, 'product'[Manufacturer], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	'product'[Manufacturer]

metrics.visualTitle: Sum of Unit Cost by Manufacturer

metrics.QueryText:
DEFINE
	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS('product'[Manufacturer], "SumUnit_Cost", CALCULATE(SUM('orderrows'[Unit Cost])))

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(1001, __DS0Core, [SumUnit_Cost], 0, 'product'[Manufacturer], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	[SumUnit_Cost] DESC, 'product'[Manufacturer]
